screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows the Ptolemaic, Earth-centered model: a planet on an epicycle whose center rides a deferent around the Earth, alongside the resulting view from Earth.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has controls for the planet and the sizes and rates of its deferent and epicycle, plus a Reset All button that returns the screen to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Adjust the deferent and epicycle to see how the planet appears to move as seen from Earth.

ptolemaic.currentDetails: The screen is in its initial state.

screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows the Sun-centered solar system with the Earth and another planet, and the configuration, such as opposition or conjunction, that they form.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has controls for choosing a planet and its orbit and for animating the orbits, plus a Reset All button that returns the screen to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Choose a planet and animate the orbits to see the planetary configurations form.

configurations.currentDetails: The screen is in its initial state.
